sections.content: This methodology covers small-cap clinical-stage biotech companies. Sources are ranked by regulatory authority, then by peer-reviewed publication, then by press release.

[{"name":"SEC EDGAR","url":"https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar","description":"Primary source for 8-K filings and regulatory submissions","access_mode":"public"},{"name":"FDA Drug Databases","url":"https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/","description":"FDA drug approval database for NDA/BLA tracking","access_mode":"public"},{"name":"ClinicalTrials.gov","url":"https://clinicaltrials.gov/","description":"Active trial registrations and results postings","access_mode":"public"}]
